seo.heroImageAlt: WayOfProcessing — international Stripe payment processing with warmed accounts
seo.bottomTitle: Buy Verified Stripe Account — Stripe Account for Sale | WayOfProcessing
seo.bottomText:
WayOfProcessing is where you can buy a verified Stripe account or rent a ready warmed account with transaction history. Stripe account for sale with up to $500,000/month volume — buy Stripe account with instant delivery or choose a rental plan for your niche.

We sell and rent Stripe merchant accounts for e-commerce, SaaS, subscriptions, forex and high-risk. Processing from 1.5%, payouts in EUR, USD and USDT. Submit a request for a free quote and instant account matching.
seo.faqHeading: Frequently asked questions about Stripe processing

faq.question: What is WayOfProcessing?
faq.answer: WayOfProcessing is an international Stripe payment processing service. We set up and support Stripe accounts, provide warmed accounts with turnover, CRM access and 24/7 support.

faq.question: How much does Stripe processing cost with WayOfProcessing?
faq.answer: Processing fees start from 1.5%. The exact rate depends on your niche, payment volume and chosen solution. A free consultation helps find the right plan.

faq.question: Which niches does WayOfProcessing support?
faq.answer: We work with marketplaces, SaaS, e-commerce, online courses, subscriptions, and high-risk niches including forex, gaming, vape, supplements and more.

faq.question: Can I buy a Stripe account or only rent one?
faq.answer: Both options are available — buy a verified Stripe account or rent a ready account under WayOfProcessing's legal entity. Stripe accounts for sale and rental for businesses worldwide, with instant delivery for warmed accounts.

faq.question: How fast can I get a ready Stripe account?
faq.answer: Buy a Stripe account with instant delivery when a warmed account is in stock. Creating a new verified account for your niche takes from 3 days with full setup.

faq.question: How much does a Stripe account cost?
faq.answer: Stripe account price depends on buy vs rent, niche, volume and jurisdiction. Submit a request — we'll calculate the cost for free and recommend the best option.

faq.question: What happens if a Stripe account fails?
faq.answer: If one account fails, payments are automatically routed to another warmed Stripe account via our Payment routing solution. Uptime is 99.9%.

faq.question: How do I contact WayOfProcessing?
faq.answer: Submit a request on the website, email hello@wayofprocessing.com or message @wayofprocessing on Telegram. The team replies on Telegram and offers free consultations.

services.heading: What we do for your business

complex.title: Legal entity, bank and Stripe — as one package
complex.desc: We register a company in the right jurisdiction, connect a bank account and Stripe. You get a working setup without hunting for separate vendors.

processing.title: Accepting payments via Stripe
processing.intro: We set up checkout for your project — from site API to pay-by-link with no development. Fees from 1.5%, no hidden charges or setup fees.

items.api: Integration into your site, app or CRM through the official Stripe API.
items.cloaking: Routing between accounts — payments keep flowing if one goes under review.
items.invoice: Payment Link and Invoice: customers pay via a link, no developer required on your side.

fintech.title: Neobanks and fintech for withdrawals
fintech.desc: We match and hand over ready Revolut, Wise, Airwallex and other accounts — so you can move money off Stripe quickly and without extra hoops.

support.title: An expert with you before and after launch
support.desc: We review your niche, run the numbers and stay involved after go-live. Telegram chat with a real specialist, not an auto-reply bot.

accounts.heading: Stripe for your project — without doing it alone
accounts.lead: Take an account under management or get one registered for yourself. We match the setup to your niche, volume and country.
accounts.desc: Every case is handled by a specialist: we assess risk, prepare infrastructure and connect in days, not months.

step1.title: Foreign entities for Stripe
step1.desc: We provide turnkey infrastructure: a foreign legal entity, bank account, and Stripe account — without registering a company abroad on your own.

step2.title: Stripe expertise A to Z
step2.desc: 7 years with Stripe and 1100+ accounts created. We know every nuance of the system and how to solve common issues.

step3.title: Reporting and taxes covered
step3.desc: We handle all entity reporting and tax obligations. Accounts are registered in tax-free jurisdictions.

step4.title: Real human support
step4.desc: The WayOfProcessing team is available on Telegram — a person answers your questions, not a bot. Free consultation at every stage.

uptime.title: Payments don't stop when something breaks
uptime.desc: If one Stripe account goes under review, transactions switch to a backup. 99.9% acceptance uptime — revenue doesn't depend on a single point of failure.

accounts.title: Accounts with history, not blank slates
accounts.desc: We hand over verified accounts with real turnover — they handle limits more smoothly than freshly registered ones. Up to $500,000 per month.

tax.title: Jurisdictions without extra tax drag
tax.desc: We pick a registration country for your model — so you don't overpay tax or drown in compliance paperwork.

crm.title: See every payment in real time
crm.desc: Personal CRM dashboard: transaction statuses, filters, Excel and CSV export — no need to ask a manager for reports.

niches.title: We work where others say no
niches.desc: E-commerce, SaaS, subscriptions, forex, gaming — with a controlled chargeback rate we'll find a setup for your niche.

withdrawals.title: Withdraw in fiat or USDT
withdrawals.desc: EUR, USD to IBAN or conversion to USDT. Standard payout cycle — 3 days, no cap on amount.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how WayOfProcessing ("we", "us") collects, uses and protects personal data when you visit wayofprocessing.com and submit requests through our contact forms.

general.title: 1. General
paragraphs: WayOfProcessing provides international Stripe payment processing services, including consultations, account setup and related support.
By using our website, you confirm that you have read this Policy. If you do not agree with its terms, please refrain from submitting personal data through the site.

dataCollected.title: 2. Data we collect
paragraphs: We only collect data that you voluntarily provide when filling out a contact form or reaching out to us:
list: comment text or description of your request;
technical data: IP address, browser type, interface language, date and time of submission (automatically via server logs).

purposes.title: 3. Purposes of processing
paragraphs: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
list: processing requests and responding to your inquiry;
improving service quality and website performance;

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal basis
paragraphs: Personal data is processed based on your consent, expressed when submitting the form with the data processing checkbox checked.
In certain cases, processing may rely on WayOfProcessing's legitimate interest — for example, to ensure website security and prevent abuse.

sharing.title: 5. Sharing with third parties
paragraphs: We do not sell or rent your personal data. Data may only be shared in the following cases:
list: hosting and infrastructure providers required to operate the website;
messengers and communication tools (e.g. Telegram) if you provided such contact details and expect a reply through them;

retention.title: 6. Data retention
paragraphs: Contact form data is kept no longer than necessary to handle your request and maintain business correspondence, but no more than 3 years from the last contact, unless a longer period is required by law.
Server logs may be retained for up to 12 months for security and diagnostics.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies and analytics
paragraphs: The site may use technically necessary cookies for proper operation (e.g. saving your selected interface language).
We do not use advertising cookies or share data with ad networks. If analytics tools are added in the future, this Policy will be updated.

rights.title: 8. Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on applicable law, you may have the right to:
list: request access to your personal data;
restrict processing or object to it;
lodge a complaint with a data protection authority.

security.title: 9. Data security
paragraphs: We apply organisational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.
Data transmitted through the site uses the HTTPS protocol. However, no method of internet transmission guarantees absolute security.

transfers.title: 10. International transfers
paragraphs: WayOfProcessing works with clients worldwide. Your data may be processed on servers located outside your country of residence.
When such transfers occur, we ensure an appropriate level of protection in line with applicable requirements.

children.title: 11. Children's data
paragraphs: Our services are intended for businesses and entrepreneurs. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 18. If you believe a child has submitted data to us, please contact us to have it removed.

changes.title: 12. Policy changes
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy. The current version is always available on this page with the date of the last update.
Material changes will be reflected in the updated publication date. By continuing to use the site after changes, you accept the updated Policy.

contact.title: 13. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about personal data processing and exercising your rights, contact us at:

footer.legal: International payment processing via Stripe. Warmed accounts, company registration, and 24/7 support. WayOfProcessing is an independent service, not affiliated with Stripe, Inc.
footer.aboutText: We help businesses accept international payments via Stripe: warmed accounts, offshore company registration, processing for any niche, and free expert consultations.
